entry.title: Minute entry from 2026-04-16 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: Hearing/Deadline Modification: Hearing set per 203 Order. Motion Hearing set for 5/13/2026 at 09:00 AM in US Courthouse, Courtroom 508, 501 W. 10th St., Fort Worth, TX 76102-3673 before Magistrate Judge Hal R. Ray Jr. (jnp)

entry.title: Entry #203 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: The Court SETS the 172 178 195 motions for a Hearing on May 13, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. C.D.T., in courtroom 508 Eldon B. Mahon United States Court House, 501 W. 10th Street, Fort Worth, Texas 76102. Responses due by 4/29/2026. Status Report due by 5/11/2026. (Ordered by Magistrate Judge Hal R. Ray, Jr on 4/16/2026) (saw) (Entered: 04/16/2026)

entry.title: Entry #202 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: Before the Court is the Motion to Modify the Scheduling Order filed by defendants OpenAI Foundation (f/k/a OpenAI, Inc.), OpenAI, L.L.C., and OpenAI OpCo, LLC. ECF No. 183 . The Court concludes there is good cause to grant the Motion, and the Motion is hereby GRANTED. The trial shall be adjourned from October 19, 2026, to January 11, 2027. Discovery due by 7/31/2026. Motions due by 9/15/2026. Pretrial Order due by 12/14/2026. (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 4/16/2026) (saw) (Entered: 04/16/2026)

entry.title: Entry #201 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: (Document Restricted) SEALED Order:The Court REFERS the 194 195 Motions to Judge Ray. Motions referred to Magistrate Judge Hal R. Ray, Jr. (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 4/16/2026) (saw) (Entered: 04/16/2026)

entry.title: Entry #200 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: Before the Court is Plaintiffs' Motion for Leave to Take Additional Party Depositions and for Expedited Briefing. ECF No. 191 . The Court believes that expedited briefing on the Motion is warranted. Accordingly, the Court hereby ORDERS a response to the Motion on or before Thursday, April 23, 2026, and a reply to the Motion on or before Tuesday, April 28, 2026. (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 4/16/2026) (saw) (Entered: 04/16/2026)

entry.title: Entry #199 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: (Document Restricted) Sealed ORDER: After due consideration, the Court hereby ORDERS that the 190 Motion is GRANTED. (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 4/16/2026) (saw) (Entered: 04/16/2026)
